nodes.name: API
nodes.summary: A set of defined rules that enable different software systems to communicate with each other.

nodes.name: License
nodes.summary: A legal document that grants permission to use, modify, or distribute software, hardware, or other intellectual property.

nodes.name: Model
nodes.summary: A software program that is trained on data to perform a specific task, such as language translation or image recognition.

nodes.name: Customer
nodes.summary: An individual or organization that uses a product or service.

nodes.name: Day
nodes.summary: A unit of time equal to 24 hours.

nodes.name: Month
nodes.summary: A unit of time equal to 30 or 31 days.

nodes.name: Year
nodes.summary: A unit of time equal to 365 or 366 days.

nodes.name: Model_Release
nodes.summary: The process of making a new version of a software program available to the public.

nodes.name: Announcement
nodes.summary: A public statement or declaration of news or information.
